title: apply_set_modifiers sorts for 0-1 modifiers
description: apply_set_modifiers() (evaluator.rs:750-790) collects modifiers into a Vec, clones that Vec into sorted, then sort_unstable_by_key. In practice, real Sieve scripts use 0 or 1 modifier per set; the sort is never needed. The Vec clone and sort should be replaced: if modifiers.len() <= 1, skip sorting entirely. If more than one, sort in-place (modifiers is already a Vec<&str> owned by the call site, or can be). The inner closure fn precedence() is clean; just avoid the unconditional clone+sort.
